messages.week_before: Heads up: I have golf next {weekday} ({date}), so I won't be able to drop you off in the morning. Just a heads up!
messages.weekend_before: Reminder: I have golf this {weekday} ({date}), so morning drop-off might not be possible. Please plan accordingly.
messages.night_before: Just a reminder: I have golf tomorrow ({date}), so I won't be able to drive you in the morning. Sorry for the inconvenience!
